title: DO NOT MERGE: update cirrus cache images
body:
Follow directions in contrib/cirrus/README.md to add 'jq'.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* To fully approve this pull request, please assign additional approvers. The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@edsantiago We're merging #2991 (you said you wanted to try it) b/c brent reminded me, it fixes a flake which is affecting all PRs.  However, I can still help get this PR in next week (independent of #2561) if you like.  Despite being somewhat of a pain, the manual steps aren't difficult, just require lots of waiting (the gcloud compute images create command is VERY slow).
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2991) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@edsantiago: PR needs rebase.

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
@edsantiago Are you handling this one with @cevich in the other Cirrus PR for updating/testing images?
@mheon this PR is almost definitely going to be closed; I'm hoping that #2561 takes care of it. I wanted to leave it open as a backup; but if open PRs are causing noise, please feel free to close.
Naw, just doing status checks on open PRs to see what I can get merged - feel free to keep open
